participants.name: Chris Johnson
participants.notes: Combine invitee. Stood on all combine marks (4.40 forty, 38" vert, 126" broad, 17 bench, 6.84 cone at combine). Did not run 40 at pro day. Completed shuttle run drill and DB positional drills only. Timed as fast as 3.90 on shuttle by some watches. Private workouts with Dallas, Minnesota, and LA Chargers.

participants.name: Bryce Phillips
participants.notes: Listed at 6-0, 190-195 lbs across sources. Saints, among other teams, conducted post-pro day visit. Ran shuttle drill (pictured). 5% missed tackle rate in 2025.

participants.name: Deshawn McCuin
participants.notes: Fastest 40 time among pro day participants. Transfer from TCU. Played STUD/nickel position at SDSU.

participants.name: Eric Butler
participants.notes: Has private session with Dallas Cowboys scheduled. Third-fastest 40 at pro day behind McCuin (4.52) and Phillips (4.56).

participants.name: Sam Benjamin
participants.notes: Nose tackle. Ran 40 and completed agility drills. Specific times not publicly reported.

participants.name: Niles King
participants.notes: Transfer from Grand Valley State (D2). Nicknamed 'Sack King' with 18.5 sacks over prior two years at GVSU. Specific times not publicly reported.

participants.name: DJ Herman
participants.notes: Special teams standout. Said his agility in the 5-10-5 shuttle was his forte. Specific times not publicly reported.

participants.name: Mister Williams
participants.notes: Photographed running drills at pro day. Specific times not publicly reported.

participants.name: Christian Jones
participants.notes: Listed at 6-9, 300 lbs per 247Sports / 6-8, 330 per other sources. Five-year SDSU player. Left tackle. Trained at X3 Performance in Fort Myers, FL with Power 4 OL prospects. Looked to impress with agility and quick feet. Day 3 draft prospect. Specific times not publicly reported.

participants.name: Bayo Kannike
participants.notes: Offensive lineman. Transfer from Utah Tech. Specific times not publicly reported.

participants.name: Ross Ulugalu-Maseuli
participants.notes: Center. First-team All-Mountain West 2025. Four-year starter (C and G). Did NOT run the 40-yard dash. Participated in measurements and indoor testing only. From La Mesa/Spring Valley area, attended Mater Dei.

participants.name: Seth Adams
participants.notes: Tight end. Specific times not publicly reported.

participants.name: Gabriel Plascencia
participants.notes: Kicker only — did kicking workout, did not participate in measurable drills or 40. Made 11-of-14 field goals during workout. Hit from 61 and 64 yards, missed 65-yarder wide left. SDSU career leader in FG% (36-of-41, .878). School-record 25 consecutive made FGs. Handled an 'icing' timeout during workout.

participants.name: Malachi Cooper
participants.notes: Visiting prospect from University of San Diego (USD). 6-4, 280 lbs. Had 5 sacks among 41 tackles in 2025. Played inside and outside DL for USD. Described as most intriguing USD participant; potential developmental D-line prospect with immediate special teams contribution. Specific times not publicly reported.

participants.name: Matt Colombo
participants.notes: Visiting prospect from University of San Diego (USD). Specific times not publicly reported.

participants.name: Mo Vanderwiel
participants.notes: Visiting prospect from University of San Diego (USD). Specific times not publicly reported.

additional_notes: Pro Day held Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at SDSU's Fowler Athletic Center (indoor measurements/testing) and adjacent practice fields (outdoor drills). Scouts from 30 of 32 NFL teams attended. Players measured for height, weight, hand and wingspan indoors, then tested on bench press, vertical jump, and broad jump in the weight room. The outdoor portion included 40-yard dash, 3-cone drill, shuttle, and positional drills. Timing method (electronic vs. hand-timed) was not specified in any source. Official times were not broadly released to media — the SD Union-Tribune reported only the 40 times for Phillips (4.56), McCuin (4.52), and Butler (4.58). Chris Johnson (NFL Combine invitee, projected Day 1-2 pick) participated in limited fashion: did not re-run the 40 but completed the shuttle drill and DB drills, standing on his combine numbers (4.40 forty, 38" vertical, 126" broad, 17 bench, 6.84 cone). Ulugalu-Maseuli and Plascencia also did not run the 40. The East Village Times noted that all but Johnson, Plascencia, and Ulugalu-Maseuli ran the 40-yard dash. Detailed measurements and full drill results for most participants were not made publicly available — scouts kept official times closely guarded. Johnson's combine measurements: 6-0, 193 lbs, 30 5/8" arms, 9 7/8" hands. Phillips listed at 6-0, 195 lbs. Cooper (USD) listed at 6-4, 280 lbs. Christian Jones listed at approximately 6-8 to 6-9, 300-330 lbs across various sources. The Daily Aztec photo captions reference the date as March 11 (Wednesday), but the Union-Tribune published results on March 10 at 6:21 PM and the pre-event article called it 'Tuesday's Pro Day,' confirming March 10 as the correct date.
